subcodes.first_line: We have beheld thy book which was presented before the Throne, and We have perused it and been apprised of its contents, for verily We are All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شاهدنا کتابک الذی حضر لدی العرش و قراناه و اطلعنا بما فیه انا کنا عالمین قد
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @suffering and imprisonment, @wisdom [hikmat]
